query:
SELECT 
  d.archetype,
  COUNT(f.id) as total_feedback,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN f.isAccurate = 1 THEN 1 END) as accurate_count,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN f.isAccurate = 0 THEN 1 END) as inaccurate_count,
  ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN f.isAccurate = 0 THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(f.id), 2) as rejection_rate
FROM diagnostics d
LEFT JOIN feedbacks f ON d.publicId = f.diagnosticPublicId
WHERE f.id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY d.archetype
ORDER BY rejection_rate DESC;

  ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN f.isAccurate = 0 THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(f.id), 2) as rejection_rate
